craigslist.title: LOW RATE for EXTENDED WEEKLY or MONTHLY STAYS! >> SAVE $$!!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post SPECIAL WEEKLY RATE > ONLY 450 for the entire week! Add a 2nd bed for 100! Includes: Individually Controlled AC/Heat, No Deposit, Luxury Room, Wi-Fi, Cable TV, Pool & Hot Tub, 24-Hour Concierge, Children Stay Free 7407 Elsie Ave Sacramento CA 95828 Experience the vibrant culture and rich history of Sacramento from the comfort of Motel 6 - South Sacramento & Elk Grove. Conveniently located near popular attractions like Sutter's Fort State Historic Park and Old Sacramento, the community offers easy access to the city's storied past and beautiful architecture. During your stay, explore the lively local scene, including well-known pubs such as Emma's Tamales, just a short drive away. Enjoy the mild climate by biking along the River Trail or catching a game at Sutter Health Park. The motel provides essential amenities like air-conditioned rooms, a 24-hour front desk, and free parking for guests arriving by vehicle. Free Parking, 24 hours Truck Parking Outdoor Pool Pets Allowed Free WiFi (Wi-Fi) Restaurant Nearby Closed-captioned TV Accessibility Mass Transit Climate-controlled Air Conditioning (AC) Shower/tub Combination Accessible Rooms Plus Fresh Bed Sheets & Towels (on request) show contact info Motel 6 - South Sacramento & Elk Grove Stay connected with paid Wi-Fi, perfect for browsing or planning your next adventure. Relax on the sun terrace after a day of exploring or unwind in your comfortable room. Sacramento's thriving arts scene, with galleries and live performances, ensures there's always something inspiring nearby. Whether visiting for leisure or business, Motel 6 - South Sacramento & Elk Grove offers a budget-friendly base to experience the best of the city.
